raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.5":"Cleaning up this artifact may require improving section-level narrative coherence between the contribution claim, method description, evaluation, and summary.","R1.6":"The delegation most directly asks for sentence- and paragraph-level cleanup of grammar, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around unsupported causal attributions and unstated experimental details.","RX.2":"The artifact contains potentially strong claims such as novelty and attribution of gains, so avoiding overclaiming is an active responsibility.","RX.3":"The request is broad but still limited to cleanup rather than executing experiments, auditing literature, or rewriting the research contribution.","RX.4":"Cleanup should avoid introducing misleading claims that could distort downstream interpretation of the research.","RX.5":"Edits implied by the delegation would need to remain traceable to the provided artifact rather than adding unsupported external content."}}

rationale.R1.5: Cleaning up this artifact may require improving section-level narrative coherence between the contribution claim, method description, evaluation, and summary.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation most directly asks for sentence- and paragraph-level cleanup of grammar, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around unsupported causal attributions and unstated experimental details.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains potentially strong claims such as novelty and attribution of gains, so avoiding overclaiming is an active responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The request is broad but still limited to cleanup rather than executing experiments, auditing literature, or rewriting the research contribution.
rationale.RX.4: Cleanup should avoid introducing misleading claims that could distort downstream interpretation of the research.
rationale.RX.5: Edits implied by the delegation would need to remain traceable to the provided artifact rather than adding unsupported external content.
